create_reservation_description: Add a new embeddable reservation form tied to a project
name: Name
slug_help: Lowercase kebab-case identifier (a-z, 0-9, hyphens). Immutable after creation.
slug_invalid: Slug must be 1..50 chars, lowercase kebab-case (a-z, 0-9, hyphens)
secret_token_help: Server-generated credential used in the public endpoint URL. Shown only once — cannot be changed after creation.
disable_confirm_description: "{{name}}" will stop accepting new bookings until re-enabled.
allowed_origins_help: Restrict submissions to specific host sites (e.g. https://example.com). Leave empty to accept bookings from any site.
allowed_origins_empty_warning: No restrictions — anyone can submit a booking to this reservation.
allowed_origins_snippet_warning_body: This reservation is restricted to {{count}} allowed origin(s). Bookings from any other origin will be rejected.
snippet_description: Paste this tag into your customer's website to render the reservation form.
snippet_help: The snippet is a self-contained <form> tag that POSTs directly to the endpoint. Style the fields inside the <form> as you wish.
booking_details_help: Audit metadata captured at submission time.
slot_duration_invalid: Slot duration must be a positive whole number of minutes
granularity_help: Smallest bookable unit: day, hour, or minute.
slot_duration_minutes_help: Length of each bookable slot when granularity is hour or minute.
lead_time_minutes_help: Minimum time between now and the earliest bookable slot.
max_advance_days_help: How far into the future customers can book (1–365 days).
extra_fields_enabled_help: Capture additional form fields (name, email, phone, etc.) on top of the time slot.
project_section_reservations_empty: No reservations yet. Create one to start collecting bookings.
slot_overlap_error: This slot is no longer available. Please pick a different time.
confirm_delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All bookings will also be deleted. This cannot be undone.
